# Calcuzy — Free Online Tools Platform
# https://calcuzy.app/

> Calcuzy is a free, fast, privacy-first online tools platform with calculators,
> converters, finance tools, legal document generators, countdown timers, name lists,
> and quote collections. No signup required. US-focused finance and tax tools use
> current federal bracket guidance with clear YMYL disclaimers.

## Core Calculators
- BMI Calculator: https://calcuzy.app/bmi-calculator/
- Age Calculator: https://calcuzy.app/age-calculator/
- Date Difference Calculator: https://calcuzy.app/date-difference/
- Ovulation Calculator: https://calcuzy.app/ovulation-calculator/
- Unit Converter: https://calcuzy.app/unit-converter/
- Random Number Generator: https://calcuzy.app/random-number-generator/
- Password Tools: https://calcuzy.app/password-tools/
- Paint Cost Calculator: https://calcuzy.app/paint-cost-calculator/

## Finance Tools
- Capital Gains Tax Calculator: https://calcuzy.app/capital-gains-calculator/
- Crypto Tax Calculator: https://calcuzy.app/crypto-tax-calculator/
- Index Fund Return Calculator: https://calcuzy.app/index-fund-return-calculator/
- Property Tax Estimator: https://calcuzy.app/property-tax-estimator/
- Rent Affordability Calculator: https://calcuzy.app/rent-affordability-calculator/

## Legal Tools
- Will Generator: https://calcuzy.app/will-generator/
- NDA Generator: https://calcuzy.app/nda-generator/
